description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:18.09-rc Docker image with a docker:dind service and defines the variable IMAGE_NAME set to registry.gitlab.com/emcrp/src. Define a single stage named build-and-push. Add a build-and-push job in that stage, set to run manually, that executes the commands: docker build -t $IMAGE_NAME ., docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_BUILD_TOKEN registry.gitlab.com, and docker push $IMAGE_NAME. The job does not produce any artifacts, caches, or additional triggers.
